title: GraveBox
description: A plugin that creates a death chest upon death.
body:
# GraveBox - Death Chest Plugin 🪦
Protect player items with automatic death chests!

## 🔹 Description
GraveBox is a lightweight plugin that prevents item loss on death by spawning a protected chest containing the player's entire inventory. Perfect for survival, hardcore, and roleplay servers!

## ✨ Key Features
✔ Automatic Death Chest – Instantly creates a chest at death location with all items.
✔ Full Inventory Protection – Saves armor, tools, and inventory slots.
✔ Custom Chest Types – Choose from chest, ender_chest, or trapped_chest.
✔ Permission Control – Restrict access with gravebox.use.
✔ Optimized Performance – Minimal server impact.

## 📥 Installation
Download GraveBox.jar and place it in plugins/.

Restart your server to generate configs.

Configure settings in plugins/GraveBox/config.yml.

Reload (/reload) or restart to apply changes.

## ⚙️ Configuration (config.yml)
```yaml
# Options: "chest", "ender_chest", "trapped_chest"
chest-type: "chest"
```

## 🔑 Permissions
| Permission | Description | Default |
|------------|-------------|---------|
| gravebox.use | Allows death chest creation | ✅ True |

## 🌟 Why Choose GraveBox?
✅ No More Lost Items – Players keep their hard-earned loot.
✅ Plug & Play – Works instantly with minimal setup.
✅ Versatile – Fits any server type (Survival, Hardcore, RPG).

📥 Download now and say goodbye to lost items! ⚔️🪦

## 🎯 Perfect For:
- Survival Servers – Reduce frustration from accidental deaths.
- Hardcore Mode – Make deaths punishing but fair.
- Roleplay Worlds – Keep immersion without losing gear.

Lightweight ✔ Customizable ✔ Easy to Use ✔
